interactions.text: CFO questioned ROI and cost justification ahead of renewal.
Renewal in 40 days; account flagged amber.
Usage dropped 30% this quarter; daily active users declining.
Daily active users down 25%; adoption declining across teams.
Several support tickets about confusion with the new workflow.
At 90% of licensed seats; power users requesting more access.
Champion asked about volume pricing for adding new seats.
Team plans to onboard two more sub-teams next quarter.
Near seat limit; more access requested by the analytics team.
Quarterly check-in went well; no concerns raised.

name: Wayne (sponsor turnover)
label_note: Hard case: churn driven by SPONSOR TURNOVER, not usage. The rules-based stub misses it (predicts monitor). A stronger LLM or an added 'sponsor change' rule would catch it — a deliberate, honest gap surfaced by the eval.

interactions.text: Executive sponsor left the company; new stakeholder is unknown.
New contact was non-committal about the upcoming renewal.
